name: Arc Bud Vessel

product_dna.core_purpose: Display one dry stem or stand as a small shelf sculpture.
product_dna.design_philosophy: A compressed arch body and narrow opening create calm vertical emphasis.
product_dna.emotional_appeal: A quiet focal point for a small space.
product_dna.target_customer: Modern-interior customers and resin makers seeking compact decor.
product_dna.decorative_benefits: Soft monolithic silhouette with controlled shadow.
product_dna.print_complexity: Moderate; internal cavity, drainage, supports, and cure require testing.
product_dna.material_efficiency: Smaller than common vases but hollowing efficiency is unverified.
product_dna.brand_alignment: Strong form language with restrained surface treatment.
product_dna.future_evolution: Two-height pair, sealed-liner option, mini and premium relief versions.
product_dna.physical_manufacturing_potential: Possible as a cast decorative bud vessel after material and liquid-use review.

market_demand.rationale: EVD-001, EVD-005, and EVD-008 show repeated minimalist-vase listings and visible engagement, mostly for FDM or free files.

competition_opportunity.rationale: EVD-001, EVD-005, and EVD-008 demonstrate a crowded minimalist-vase theme.

profitability.rationale: EVD-001 shows a low visible sale price while resin mass and paid conversion remain Unknown.

evergreen_potential.rationale: EVD-001 positions a vase across modern interiors, centerpieces, and flowers rather than a narrow event.

brand_alignment.rationale: EVD-009 marks resin-market validation Unknown; the compact arch silhouette strongly fits Quiet Architectural rules.

collection_potential.rationale: EVD-007 and EVD-008 show variant and collection packaging for vessel families.

bundle_potential.rationale: EVD-007 bundles multiple parts and links to a broader vessel collection.

physical_product_potential.rationale: EVD-001 presents vase use in physical interior contexts, though Atlas manufacturing is untested.

seo_opportunity.rationale: EVD-001, EVD-005, and EVD-008 provide repeated minimalist vase, modern decor, flower, and STL language.

resin_printability.rationale: EVD-005 and EVD-008 concern printable files but resin hollowing, trapped resin, and support behavior are Unknown.

ai_production_efficiency.rationale: EVD-009 marks production evidence Unknown; a smooth parametric vessel is efficient to model and vary.

customer_value.rationale: EVD-001 identifies decor, centerpiece, flowers, and gift uses, but dry-stem limitation narrows value.

production_simplicity.rationale: EVD-009 marks resin production Unknown; hollowing and drainage add complexity despite a simple exterior.

marketplace_fit.rationale: EVD-001 supports Etsy fit and EVD-005/EVD-008 support Cults3D category fit.

improvement_actions: Position for dry stems until tested
